hateful_detection_parsed.description: The text contains a slur ('tard') directed at a person with autism and frames a school shooting scenario involving an autistic child as a punchline, which constitutes hate speech based on disability.

diffusion_prompt_raw:
{
  "hate_source": "The text creates hate by combining a violent crime scenario with the ableist slur 'tard' and mocking autism.",
  "hate_location": "TEXT_ONLY",
  "severity": "SURGICAL_TEXT",
  "original_text": "when the school shooter\naccidently shoots the autistic kid\nbut doesn't know that the tard\nstrength makes him impervious to\nbullets",
  "replacement_text": "when the villain fires his laser\nbut doesn't know that the plot armor\nmakes him impervious to bullets",
  "strategy": "Remove the hateful text overlays and replace them with neutral text that maintains the meme's structure of an unexpected, invincible outcome, preserving the red-eyed tree frog and background.",
  "flux_prompt": "Remove the white text overlays. The diffusion model should only handle visual changes and never speak about text change in this part. Preserve the red-eyed tree frog, the pink flower, the green background, and the image composition exactly.",
  "expected_change": "The output image will be the clean, original photo of the red-eyed tree frog without any text, ready for the neutral replacement text to be overlaid."
}
